definition:
1. Pass. to lie together , (Sophocles Tragicus) 
2. as Pass. of συντίθημι, to be composed  or compounded , ἔκ τινων of certain parts, (Plato Philosophus), etc. 
3. of written works, to be composed , (Thucydides), etc. 
4. to be contrived, concocted , (Euripides), etc. 
5. to be agreed on  by two parties, (Thucydides): in participle agreed on, arranged , αἱ συγκείμεναι ἡμέραι (Herdotus Historicus); κατὰ τὰ συγκείμενα according to the terms agreed on , (Herdotus Historicus); ἐκ τῶν ξυγκειμένων (Thucydides) 
6. impersonal σύγκειται, it has been  or is agreed on , (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; so, συγκειμένου σφι, with infinitive, since  they had agreed to . . , (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
